message:
chore(fuzz): update Cargo.lock for algorithm fuzzer dependencies

Adds arbitrary crate and fnx-algorithms dependency for E7 structure-aware
algorithm fuzzers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -13,6 +13,9 @@ name = "arbitrary"
 version = "1.4.2"
 source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
 checksum = "c3d036a3c4ab069c7b410a2ce876bd74808d2d0888a82667669f8e783a898bf1"
+dependencies = [
+ "derive_arbitrary",
+]
 
 [[package]]
 name = "arc-swap"
@@ -105,6 +108,17 @@ dependencies = [
  "libc",
 ]
 
+[[package]]
+name = "derive_arbitrary"
+version = "1.4.2"
+source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
+checksum = "1e567bd82dcff979e4b03460c307b3cdc9e96fde3d73bed1496d2bc75d9dd62a"
+dependencies = [
+ "proc-macro2",
+ "quote",
+ "syn",
+]
+
 [[package]]
 name = "equivalent"
 version = "1.0.2"
@@ -170,6 +184,8 @@ dependencies = [
 name = "fnx-fuzz"
 version = "0.0.0"
 dependencies = [
+ "arbitrary",
+ "fnx-algorithms",
  "fnx-classes",
  "fnx-python",
  "fnx-readwrite",
